title: Echo Step Enchant
description: Adds an enchantment that allows you to step instantly 1 block up, crafted with echo shards, netherite boots and a book
body:
Adds an enchantment that allows you to step instantly 1 block up, crafted with echo shards, netherite boots and a book. 

Recipe of the enchantment:
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9486242dbc13e27ec231d363fe792c5b5e8b0d4.png)

Here is a demo of a player wearing boots with Echo Step enchantment:
